text:
There once was a forest filled with mysterious creatures. In this enchanted woodland, a shy squirrel named Spike had the biggest dream: to visit the legendary Whispering Glade where it was said the Moonflower blossomed once every century.

Every night, Spike would scamper up the ancient oak tree at the forest's edge, gaze up at the glowing moon, and wonder how he might find this magical place.

One day, after gathering acorns as an offering, Spike decided it was time to seek out the Glade. He embarked on a journey through the forest, stumbling upon ancient paths that twisted through the trees, each branch bearing a sign written in an indecipherable script.

After what felt like eternity, Spike reached a clearing where the trees seemed to lean a bit more kindly. Before him stood a glade bathed in moonlight. Soft whispers filled the air, and flowers of every color danced in the moonbeams. Spike stopped in his tracks, his eyes wide. A Moonflower
